202302/2025-12-02/Snipaste_2025-12-03_21.text:
Dear Mr.president
As a student of our university, I am writing to put forward some suggestions for optimizing the campus innovation and entrepreneurship space.
First of all,we can make some plans to Al-empowered learning,which will be beneficial to the integration of Al into various subjects.In addition,It is necessary to provide more practical space like Maker Spaces, where students can get their hands dirty with creative practices. This will bring a sense of well-being/achievement to them while they are crafting. Furthermore, By offering a variety of career preparation activities in advance,students can develop a more positive mindset integrating into society and obtain lifelong career guidance.
It is my honor if my suggestions could be adopted.Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions or need further details.
Yours sincerely 230000
Li Ming
